JAYESYN Join the list

Los Angeles · New project

JAYESYN

Three singles, one month apart. A four-track EP. A remix project. A vinyl pressing. All of it drawn from fifty original works of art.

Hear the first single early

The sequence

  1. SGL 001 Single One TBA 2026 · Announced
  2. SGL 002 Single Two TBA 2026 · Scheduled
  3. SGL 003 Single Three TBA 2026 · Scheduled
  4. EP 001 Four-Track EP TBA 2026 · In production
  5. RMX 001 Remix Project TBA 2027 · Planned
  6. VNL 001 EP on Vinyl TBA 2027 · Planned

The art

Every release is packaged in original visual art by the artist — fifty pieces, one body of work.

Hear it first.

One email when each release drops. Nothing else.
